releaseNotes: v0.29.1 — closes the known limitation in v0.29.0's release notes (concurrent same-zone edits from both devices). If you renamed a zone on one device at the same instant as you deleted that same zone on the other, the two devices could end up disagreeing about the final state. v0.29.1 introduces a local tombstone record on each device that tracks delete signals so a late-arriving stale upsert can't resurrect a deleted zone. No-op for sequential edits; safety net for concurrent ones. If you're on v0.29.0 today, the auto-updater will roll you to v0.29.1 on next launch. Schema v21→v22 (adds the tombstone table) is automatic on first launch. 592 tests passing.
